anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1150 Spoilers: Luffy vs. Imu Showdown Imminent
anime_pulse_items.summary: Latest One Piece manga chapter reveals the final battle is near, with Luffy confronting Imu. Fans are speculating about the true nature of the One Piece treasure.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Anime Project Announced for 20th Anniversary
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio Mappa announced a brand new Death Note anime series, set to premiere in 2027. Fans are divided on the new art style.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto Live-Action Movie in Development at Lionsgate
anime_pulse_items.summary: Lionsgate confirms a Naruto live-action film, with a script by Tasha Huo. Expect a 2027 release.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Super Manga Arc Concludes; New Arc Teased
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Granolah arc ends with a shocking twist. A new arc featuring the return of Frieza is teased for next month.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Premiere Date Revealed: July 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 will premiere on July 10, 2026. New trailer shows the Culling Game arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie to be Trilogy
anime_pulse_items.summary: Ufotable announces the Infinity Castle arc will be a theatrical trilogy, with part 1 releasing in October 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: Final Season Part 3 Director's Cut Released
anime_pulse_items.summary: A 2-hour director's cut of the final episode adds new scenes and an extended ending. Available now on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Manga Final Arc: Deku vs. Shigaraki Ends in Tragedy
anime_pulse_items.summary: Chapter 430 reveals the final battle's aftermath, with Deku losing his Quirk. Fans are emotional.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2 Teaser: Reze Arc Confirmed
anime_pulse_items.summary: A teaser trailer for Chainsaw Man Season 2 reveals the Reze arc, premiering in August 2026 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3 Announced for 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: Season 3 of Spy x Family is confirmed, with a focus on the Cruise Adventure arc. More details at Anime Expo.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren took home 7 awards including Best Anime and Best Fantasy. Season 2 hype is at an all-time high.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Release Date Confirmed for June 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Season 2 of Solo Leveling will premiere on June 15, 2026. New key visual shows Jin-Woo vs. the Ant King.

anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece: Live-Action Season 2 Casting Updates
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix announces new cast members for One Piece Season 2, including actors for Chopper and Robin. Filming starts July 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: Musical Adaptation Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Death Note stage musical in Tokyo sold out all shows. A world tour is being planned.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto Chapter 80: Kawaki's Betrayal Shocks Fans
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto manga reveals Kawaki's true intentions. The chapter ends with a cliffhanger involving Naruto.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO Game Sells 5 Million Copies in First Week
anime_pulse_items.summary: Bandai Namco announces record-breaking sales for Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO, the latest fighting game.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Gojo Returns in New Light Novel
anime_pulse_items.summary: A new light novel focusing on Gojo's past releases, hinting at his possible return in the main series.
